description: Assigns properties to beam elements in the range. The properties consist of constitutive model properties, and additional properties of beam-type elements. The constitutive model property names are primary keywords, but are not included in the list above. The following properties are available, with the constitutive model properties listed first.

keywords.name: direction-y
keywords.description: direction-y vector whose projection onto the element cross-section defines the \(y\) -axis of the element coordinate system

keywords.name: moi-y
keywords.description: moment of inertia with respect to element \(y\) -axis

keywords.name: moi-z
keywords.description: moment of inertia with respect to element \(z\) -axis

keywords.name: plastic-moment
keywords.description: plastic moment capacity in Y and Z

keywords.name: plastic-shear
keywords.description: plastic shear capacity in Y and Z

keywords.name: shear-coefficient
keywords.description: shear coefficient for transverse shear deformation in the \(y\) -direction (Timoshenko beam element only)

keywords.name: shear-coefficient-y
keywords.description: shear coefficient for transverse shear deformation in the \(y\) -direction (Timoshenko beam element only)

keywords.name: shear-coefficient-z
keywords.description: shear coefficient for transverse shear deformation in the \(z\) -direction (Timoshenko beam element only)
